meta.title: Amazon Fulfillment Center Implementing OT IIoT
meta.description:
David Soto of Amazon begins by explaining the environment in an Amazon Fulfillment Center where they have same day service. Traditional OT, robotics, IoT devices, drones, hand scanners, and all the IT systems. Availability and safety are key concerns.

David then quickly goes over the basics --- segmentation, asset inventory, IAM, harden and secure configuration, ... And follows this up with a specific example of how they create the label for a shipment and secure this information and process.
